case_title: GUILLERMO BUSTILLO VS. TEGSCO, LLC (CALIFORNIA) DBA SF AUTORETURN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK; S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSTILLO, GUILLERMO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO, LLC (CALIFORNIA) DBA SF AUTORETURN ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, DEFENDANT SHALL CONTINUE TO COOPERATE WITH PLAINTIFF TO CORRECT HIS CREDIT REPORT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUSTILLO, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO, LLC (CALIFORNIA) DBA SF AUTORETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-19-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO, LLC (CALIFORNIA) DBA SF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2007. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. BY PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
